_comment: Office park lots. col(0..2)/row(0..1) place the building on the plaza grid; deposit is paid once to lease, rent is charged per in-game month. HQ starts leased. `dept` themes the building (color); `plan` is the floor-plan template (assets/floor_plans.json) used for its interior.
_npc_comment: Non-leasable flavor buildings around the plaza. `sign` is a GLB word-sign in glb/signs (or null for a plain awning + label). `x`,`z` are world coords; all face +z. `awning` tints the door canopy. A `task` makes the building a QUEST STOP: walk up + press E to complete that to-do (tasks.py key), pay `reward` seed cash once, and post `blurb` to the inbox.

npc.name: Chamber of Commerce
npc.blurb: Registered with the Chamber. They helped you pin down exactly who you're for.

npc.name: City Registrar
npc.blurb: Filed the paperwork — your domain and business name are officially yours.

npc.name: Insight Research Co.
npc.blurb: Insight Research handed over a competitor teardown. You know the field now.

npc.name: Small Business Bureau
npc.blurb: The Bureau walked you through revenue models. Your business model is sketched.

npc.name: Ace Sign & Print
npc.blurb: Ace Sign & Print mocked up your logo. It actually looks like a company.

npc.name: Hue Brand Studio
npc.blurb: Hue Studio nailed your brand palette. Everything matches now.

npc.name: First City Bank
npc.blurb: The bank's advisor helped you set pricing that won't leave money on the table.

npc.name: Apex Securities
npc.blurb: Apex Securities — the trading floor where fortunes are made (and unmade).

npc.name: Startup Incubator
npc.blurb: At the Incubator you mapped your business model canvas.

npc.name: Apex Ventures
npc.blurb: Apex Ventures - bring a complete pitch and walk out with a check.

npc.name: Angel Investor
npc.blurb: Apex's seed desk loved the pitch and wired you $5,000 to get off the ground — your first outside money.

npc.name: The Outfitters
npc.blurb: The Outfitters - change your look and pick up a sharp new suit.

npc.name: TalentWorks Staffing
npc.blurb: TalentWorks - browse AI talent and bring someone on board.

npc.name: Grants Office
npc.blurb: The Grants Office reviews business funding applications.

npc.name: Trade Embassy
npc.blurb: The Trade Embassy runs your overseas venture — a farm in South America that earns passive income while you build.

npc.name: Lucky's Casino
npc.blurb: The pit boss schooled you on runway and risk — cash is oxygen, never bet the company.

npc.name: Corner Bakery
npc.blurb: The baker filled you in on how money flows in this town — earn, raise, price right, stay lean.

npc.name: Sharp Cuts
npc.blurb: The barber reminded you: your network is your net worth, and word of mouth beats any ad.

npc.name: Page & Co.
npc.blurb: The bookseller's advice: do one thing better than anyone, and measure what matters.

npc.name: Wellness Pharmacy
npc.blurb: The pharmacist's reminder: it's a marathon — rest, lean on your team, and don't burn out.

npc.name: Fresh Market
npc.blurb: The Fresh Market city guide showed you the ropes — you know your way around town now.

npc.name: 24/7 Mart
npc.blurb: The shopkeeper's hustle lesson: do things that don't scale, ship scrappy, chase quick wins.

npc.name: Bean Scene Cafe
npc.blurb: You bought Robin a coffee and laid it all out. They're in — your first believer, and your co-founder.

_parks_comment: City parks: named green spaces that replace a backdrop building at their grid address (avenue, street). Decorative only — grass + scattered seasonal trees + a central fountain + a floating name label. Walkable (no collision), no interaction.
